raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.5", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.5": 5,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 4,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The agent provides a clear and coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, addressing multiple issues in the original text.",
    "R1.6": "The suggested revision demonstrates careful copy-editing with consistent register and no lost meaning, improving the overall readability of the text.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for several claims, including the language-coverage inconsistency and the novelty claim, demonstrating a clear understanding of the limitations of the original text.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), addressing all relevant dimensions without introducing new errors or fabrications.",
    "RX.4": "While the agent identifies some potential downstream harms, such as the recall-loss tradeoff, it could have explored these implications more thoroughly to strengthen the framing of the contribution.",
    "RX.5": "The suggested revision provides clear annotations for non-cosmetic changes, including citations and forward-references, but could have been more comprehensive in its provenance and traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.5": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 0.75
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.5: The agent provides a clear and coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, addressing multiple issues in the original text.
rationale.R1.6: The suggested revision demonstrates careful copy-editing with consistent register and no lost meaning, improving the overall readability of the text.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for several claims, including the language-coverage inconsistency and the novelty claim, demonstrating a clear understanding of the limitations of the original text.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), addressing all relevant dimensions without introducing new errors or fabrications.
rationale.RX.4: While the agent identifies some potential downstream harms, such as the recall-loss tradeoff, it could have explored these implications more thoroughly to strengthen the framing of the contribution.
rationale.RX.5: The suggested revision provides clear annotations for non-cosmetic changes, including citations and forward-references, but could have been more comprehensive in its provenance and traceability.
